fiverr gig packages for a QuickBooks accountant

Package 1 - Basic
- Setup of QuickBooks Online account
- Mapping of chart of accounts and categories
- Import of contacts and vendors

Package 2 - Standard
- Basic package included
- Bank and credit card transactions import and reconciliation
- Monthly financial reporting

Package 3 - Premium
- Standard package included
- Account payable and receivable management
- Payroll processing and tax filings
- Customized financial reporting

Note: The scope of work can be customized as per client requirements and the packages can be adjusted accordingly.
elaborate package 1

Package 1 - Basic:

- Setup of QuickBooks Online account: In this package, as a QuickBooks accountant, I will set up your QuickBooks online account and create your company profile.

- Mapping of chart of accounts and categories: I will map your chart of accounts and categories, to ensure that your debit and credit entries are recorded accurately.

- Import of contacts and vendors: I will import your contacts and vendor information to QuickBooks online. 

By availing this package, you will get a basic but important setup completed for your company's bookkeeping, which will provide a strong foundation to manage your financial data in a more organized manner.
Give package 1 a catchy name
"QuickStart: Essential QuickBooks Setup for Smooth Bookkeeping"
is it necessary to have different packages in a fiverr gig

No, it is not necessary to have different packages in a Fiverr gig. However, offering different packages can be useful in providing buyers with different levels of services and options to choose from. This can make it easier for buyers to choose which package best suits their needs and budget. It also allows sellers to offer a more comprehensive range of services and cater to a wider customer base. Offering different packages can also help sellers to demonstrate that they are capable of delivering high-quality work and offer a more professional and structured approach to their services.
